parameters.name: ncy
parameters.label: Number of Copies
parameters.description: Sets the number of copies. If the template input is used, that's the number of copies per template point.

parameters.name: xord
parameters.label: Transform Order
parameters.description: Sets the overall transform order for the transformations.

parameters.name: rord
parameters.label: Rotate Order
parameters.description: Sets the order of the rotations within the overall transform order.

parameters.name: scale
parameters.label: Uniform Scale
parameters.description: Specifies a uniform scale factor in all axes.

parameters.name: copyid
parameters.label: CopyId Attribute
parameters.description: Whether to output an attribute containing the copy index and where.

parameters.name: lookat
parameters.label: Look At
parameters.description: Orients the copied geometry (Z axis) to look at, or point to, the object component specified in the parameter.

parameters.name: forwarddir
parameters.label: Forward Direction
parameters.description: Determines the forward direction for look at transformation.

parameters.name: vlength
parameters.label: Vectors Maintain Length
parameters.description: Enable preserving the original vector length after applying transformations.

parameters.name: dimension
parameters.label: Append Dimension
parameters.description: Always add a dimension, or only add a dimesion when its size is 2 or more.

parameters.name: dotemplatematrix
parameters.label: Template Matrix Transform
parameters.description: Whether to use a transform matrix attribute on the template points.

parameters.name: templatexord
parameters.label: Template Transform Order
parameters.description: Sets the overall transform order for the template transformations.

parameters.name: templaterord
parameters.label: Template Rotate Order
parameters.description: Sets the order of the X, Y and Z rotations within the overall template transform.

parameters.name: dotemplatetranslate
parameters.label: Template Translate
parameters.description: Whether to use a translate attribute on the template points.

parameters.name: dotemplaterotate
parameters.label: Template Rotate
parameters.description: Whether to use a rotate attribute on the template points.

parameters.name: dotemplatescale
parameters.label: Template Scale
parameters.description: Whether to use a scale attribute on the template points.

parameters.name: dotemplatepivot
parameters.label: Template Pivot
parameters.description: Whether to use a pivot attribute on the template points.

parameters.name: dotemplaterotateto
parameters.label: Template Rotate to Vector
parameters.description: Enable align to vector rotation, using the template input as a reference.

parameters.name: templaterottoord
parameters.label: Template Rotate to Order
parameters.description: Sets the order of axis and align to vector rotations within the overall template transform.

parameters.name: instanceforward
parameters.label: Rotate to Vector : Forward Direction
parameters.description: Base forward direction used to compute the rotation to vector.

parameters.name: vecattr
parameters.label: Rotate to Vector Attribute
parameters.description: Input attribute used to compute the rotation to vector.

parameters.name: upvectoratype
parameters.label: Up Vector Type
parameters.description: Specifies the up vector source.

parameters.name: upattr
parameters.label: Up Attribute
parameters.description: Defines the scope of the up attribute used for alignment with template vectors.

parameters.name: templateid
parameters.label: TemplateId Attribute
parameters.description: Output a template ID attribute to points, vertices or primitives.

parameters.name: doattr
parameters.label: Use Template Point Attribs
parameters.description: Enable additional operations on template input attributes.

parameters.name: templateattr
parameters.label: Template Attribute
parameters.description: Start of Sequential Parameter Blocks for attributes as combinations of the first input and the template input.

parameters.name: templateattr0op
parameters.label: Operation
parameters.description: Choose how to combine the template attribute with the matching attribute on the copy if it exists.

parameters.name: templateattr0dest
parameters.label: Destination
parameters.description: Sets the attribute class where the template point attribute operation will happen.

parameters.name: templateattr0names
parameters.label: Names
parameters.description: Names of the attributes on the template input to use.

parameters.name: bypass
parameters.label: Bypass
parameters.description: Pass through the first input to the output unchanged.

parameters.name: freeextragpumem
parameters.label: Free Extra GPU Memory
parameters.description: Free memory that has accumulated when output memory has grown and shrunk.

parameters.name: delinputattrs
parameters.label: Delete Input Attributes
parameters.description: Only output which attributes you specify in this helps isolate attributes into a separate branch.
